mapper.select: select a.username, a.first_name || ' ' || a.last_name as fullname, 'adminpassword' as password, b.name as role from lscms_auth_systemuser a, lscms_auth_group b, lscms_auth_systemuser_groups c where 1=1 and a.id = c.systemuser_id and b.id=c.group_id and a.username=#{username} and is_deleted=false
